title: Needan

{{Quote|I know for a fact that the Great Geel never leaves the Geelan homeworld.|Personal addendum by Platt Okeefe|<ref name="Zirtran">{{JournalCite|5|Zirtran's Anchor (article)}}</ref>}}
'''Needan''' was a [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. A [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] world featuring massive [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] and numerous [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Plant/Legends|plants]] and animals, it was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Geelan]]. Just as the Geelan civilization on Needan had entered the information age, a [[Unidentified comet|passing comet]] struck the planet, causing the climate to become permanently [[Temperature/Legends|cold]].

The Geelan survived the ensuing mass extinction of Needan's species by sheltering themselves inside [[Domed city/Legends|dome-like habitats]] they constructed. Eventually, an [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]]-crewed [[Medic/Legends|medical]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] picked up the Geelan [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signals]], leading to a contact between the two species and a mass emigration of the Geelan from their doomed homeworld.

==Description==
Needan was an extremely remote<ref name="AlienEncounters" /> [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="EAOC Needan" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Journal13">{{JournalCite|13|Alien Encounters (article series)}}</ref> located in the [[Death/Legends|dying]]<ref name="Zirtran" /> [[Needan system/Legends|Needan system]].<ref name="EAOC Needan" /> A beautiful terrestrial world [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] a single life-giving [[Star/Legends|star]], two thirds of Needan's surface were covered by immense [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] that teemed with living [[Species/Legends|organisms]]. Land on Needan featured [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]], which were also inhabited by countless [[Plant/Legends|plant]] and animal species. At some point, a [[Unidentified canine pack animal|species]] of [[Dog/Legends|canine]] pack animals lived on Needan, eventually evolving into the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Geelan]].<ref name="AlienEncounters" />

==History==
===A doomed homeworld===
[[File:Geelan-SWAJ13.png|thumb|right|200px|Needan was the homeworld of the Geelan species.]]
Not long after developing sentience, the Geelan followed their inherent pack instinct and formed [[City/Legends|cities]] on their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. Disaster struck as the Geelan civilization was entering the information age. A [[Unidentified comet|passing comet]] impacted Needan,<ref name="AlienEncounters" /> sending the planet into a wider orbit,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|329|Geelan}}</ref> on a trajectory rapidly carrying it away from its sun. The resulting permanently [[Temperature/Legends|cold]] and [[Winter/Legends|winter]]-like climate led to the extinction of the majority of Needan's species, although the Geelan survived by building and retreating to [[Domed city/Legends|dome-like habitats]].<ref name="AlienEncounters" />

However, when the Geelan realized that the [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] supply on which they relied was rapidly dwindling, the species' [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] began sending out [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signals]] into outer [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. The signals were intercepted by a [[Medic/Legends|medical]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] crewed by members of the [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] species, who tracked and followed the communication, leading them to Needan.<ref name="AlienEncounters" />

===Needan's legacy===
As a result of the following offworlder visit, the Geelan learned of and adapted [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] technology. The fact that their homeworld was dying led many Geelan to emigrate and explore the wider [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]],<ref name="AlienEncounters" /> as well as imbuing members of the species with a strong instinct for hoarding various possessions.<ref name="Zirtran" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Great Geel (post-Vanishing)|Geelan]] who held the title of<ref name="Zirtran" /> [[Great Geel]]—the leader of the entire Geelan species<ref name="AlienEncounters" />—occasionally visited [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|Zirtran's Anchor]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located near the<ref name="Zirtran" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Phosphura Belt Nebula/Legends|Phosphura Belt Nebula]]. However, in a personal addendum to a document describing the space station, the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] claimed incorrectly that<ref name="Zirtran" /> she<ref name="CSWE Okeefe">{{CSWECite|II|406|Okeefe, Platt}}</ref> was certain the Great Geel never left the Geelan homeworld.<ref name="Zirtran" />

==Inhabitants==
Needan was the homeworld of the Geelan, a species of sentient, [[Limb/Legends|bipedal]] canines. The Geelan were avid [[Merchant/Legends|traders]], and the entire species was ruled by a single leader known as the Great Geel.<ref name="AlienEncounters" />

==Behind the scenes==
Needan was first indirectly mentioned in "[[Zirtran's Anchor (article)|Zirtran's Anchor]]," a [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying game]] article written by [[Tony Russo|Anthony P. Russo]] and published in the [[February]] [[1995]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|fifth issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''.<ref name="Zirtran" /> [[Brian Smithson]] later identified the Geelan homeworld as Needan in the "[[Alien Encounters (article series)|Alien Encounters]]" feature of the [[May]] [[1997]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 13|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 13]].<ref name="Journal13" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Needan [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Needan, in grid square I-20.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
